name: joint
description: Joint-plane visualization across the model — draw joint surfaces, restrict to 'cracked' (failed) segments, 'contour' by a named joint property or value, project orientations on a 'stereonet', and 'label' categorically. 'joined' merges coplanar segments; 'threshold' filters by value.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Clip the item against the global model clip box.
Set the discrete colour list used for categorical colouring.
Colour entities by a scalar/vector/tensor field attribute. See sub-item 'contour'.
Restrict drawing to cracked (failed) joint segments.
Apply a 3D cutting plane to the item.
Categorical colour/label entities (group, model, state, id, ...). See sub-item 'label'.
Configure the contour colour map (ranges, intervals, colours).
Draw filled polygons (faces) rather than wireframe.
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Render orientations on a stereonet projection.
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

sub_items.name: contour
sub_items.description: Contour joints by a named property ('property-name <string>') or value.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create joint cracked on legend active on
plot item create joint contour property-name 'friction' legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Colour joints by a named property field.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create joint stereonet active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Project joint orientations on a stereonet.

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against 3DEC 9.0.
